title: BEM-841 audit Claude auth
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 11:36 (UTC+3)'
refs=[]
for p in sorted(Path('.github/workflows').glob('*.yml'))+sorted(Path('.github/workflows').glob('*.yaml')):
    txt=p.read_text(errors='ignore')
    if 'CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN' in txt or 'ANTHROPIC_API_KEY' in txt or 'claude-code-action' in txt:
        refs.append({'path':str(p),'has_oauth':'CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN' in txt,'has_api_key':'ANTHROPIC_API_KEY' in txt,'has_action':'claude-code-action' in txt})
conflicts=[r for r in refs if r['has_oauth'] and r['has_api_key']]
status='claude_auth_conflict_possible' if conflicts else 'claude_auth_refs_audited'
next_action='if conflict exists, choose one auth path in workflow and document operator secret update' if conflicts else 'after operator updates secret, run Claude dispatcher smoke'
state={'bem':'BEM-841','status':status,'refs':refs,'conflicts':conflicts,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem841_audit_claude_auth_workflow_refs.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem841_audit_claude_auth_workflow_refs.md').write_text('# BEM-841 | Audit Claude Auth Workflow Refs | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem841_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Secrets must not be pasted into chat.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-841'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem841_audit_claude_auth_workflow_refs.json','governance/reports/bem841_audit_claude_auth_workflow_refs.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem841_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Audited Claude workflow authentication references for possible ANTHROPIC_API_KEY and CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN conflict')
"""
No issue comments.
